title: 2024 is your year of travel with these female-friendly destinations
description: TOURISM NEWS - Ready to tick off those...
bodyText:
TOURISM NEWS - Ready to tick off those international destinations you’ve been wanting to see for so long? Make this year count and turn it into the year of seeing the world…on your own or with your girlfriends, as we’ve got five places that are perfect to visit without a male companion.


> For the adventure seeker


- Explore the rugged terrains of Patagonia, South America, with its stunning glaciers and breathtaking landscapes.
- Embark on an African safari in Botswana, where you can witness magnificent wildlife up close in their natural habitat.
- Or, how about an epic, all-inclusive ski holiday with Club Med?


> For the culture lover


- Discover the ancient wonders of Egypt, including the pyramids of Giza and the iconic Sphinx.
- Wander through the romantic streets of Florence, Italy, and immerse yourself in Renaissance art and architecture.
- Embark on a cruise through the Mediterranean, exploring historical cities like Athens, Rome, and Dubrovnik.


> For the spa goddess


- Escape to a luxury spa resort in Bali, Indonesia, where ancient healing traditions await amidst a tropical paradise.
- Unwind in the serene beauty of a resort in Sri Lanka offers holistic wellness experiences and Ayurvedic treatments.


> For the shopaholic


- Indulge in luxury shopping in Dubai, UAE, at sprawling malls and vibrant souks.
- Experience the fashion hub of Milan, Italy,home to designer boutiques and iconic fashion streets.
- Shop up a storm in Istanbul’s markets – jam-packed with traditional treasures.


> For the foodie


- Satisfy your taste buds in Tokyo, Japan, with its Michelin-starred restaurants or delectable street food in Singapore.
- Indulge in the vibrant food scene of Barcelona, Spain, renowned for its tapas and Mediterranean delights, or feast on fresh pasta in Italy.

Article: Caxton publication, Alberton Record

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
